text: Reduced inner eye pressure which has slowed or possibly eliminated the disease. At the very least, the symptoms of glucoma immediately improved to normal and have remained at the normal range. Longer eye lashes, darker eyes, slight eye irritation. I have been very satisfied with the results of taking lumigan. My eye pressure was in the mid 20's and has dropped to the mid teen's. As an experiment, I stopped taking lumigan for several months and my pressure went back up over 20, so I went back on lumigan and it again dropped to the mid teen's. The preferred range of eye pressure is 10 to 20, with 15 or below considered to be optimal.
